Package models.common

Class Component

  • java.lang.Object
    • models.common.Component
  • @Entity
public class Component
extends java.lang.Object
    DB entity of a component. It's used by JPA and JSON marshaling. The corresponding UI model is models.gui.ComponentProperties.
